title: ilex taiwanensis
intro: Ilex taiwanensis, also known as Taiwan holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex taiwanensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. Herbal preparations of Ilex taiwanensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and to alleviate various health issues.
